title: Follow consistent function naming conventions
description: Function names should follow a consistent naming convention to improve code readability and team collaboration. Inconsistent naming makes code harder to understand and maintain, reducing development efficiency and increasing the risk of errors.
recommendation: Use consistent naming patterns matching provided regular expressions for all function names.

noncompliant.description: Inconsistent naming conventions make code harder to read and maintain.

compliant.description: Consistent camelCase naming with clear, descriptive function names that follow Go conventions.
